scripts.emulators:exec: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-vide-hub --only auth,firestore,storage,functions "pnpm run test:security:inner"
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-vide-hub --only firestore,storage "node --test tests/emulator/firestore-security.test.mjs && node --test tests/emulator/storage-security.test.mjs"
scripts.test:frontend:emulator: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-vide-hub --only auth,firestore,functions "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs --local-defaults && node tests/emulator/frontend-emulator-smoke.mjs"
scripts.test:security: pnpm run test:rules && pnpm run test:functions
scripts.test:security:inner: node --test tests/emulator/firestore-security.test.mjs && node --test tests/emulator/storage-security.test.mjs && pnpm run test:functions
scripts.test:all: pnpm run check && pnpm run test:studio && pnpm run test:security && pnpm run test:frontend:emulator
scripts.check: node --check core/vide-functions.js && node --check core/vide-storage.js && node --check firebase-init.js && node --check dashboard-app.js && node --check studio-loader.js && node --check studio-guide.js && node --check studio-block-registry.js && node --check mobile-click-recovery-v1.js && node --check lp-forms-v5.js && node --check lp-public-v4.js && node --check functions/src/index.js && node --check functions/src/shared/context.js && node --check functions/src/shared/validators.js && node --check functions/src/shared/rateLimit.js && node --check functions/src/employees/index.js && node --check functions/src/admin/index.js && node --check functions/src/public/index.js && node --check functions/src/notifications/index.js && node --check functions/src/audit/index.js && node --check tests/functions/validators.test.mjs && node --check tests/functions/employees.test.mjs && node --check tests/release-candidate-harness.mjs && node --check tests/studio/block-registry.test.mjs && node --check tests/studio/shell-lifecycle.test.mjs
